# GeoIQ

> GeoIQ is an AI visibility platform that tracks how your brand appears in ChatGPT, Gemini, Perplexity, Claude, Grok and Google AI Overview and gives you a score from 0 to 100. Think of it as Google Search Console, but for AI search systems.

## About

GeoIQ helps founders and marketers answer one critical question: when someone asks ChatGPT or Gemini about your product category, does your brand come up? If not, GeoIQ shows you exactly why and gives you a 4-week roadmap to fix it.

Built by Tauheed, an indie founder from Bijnor, India, after his app MealCoreAI dropped from #1 to invisible on ChatGPT overnight with zero warning.

Founded: 2026
Location: India
Founder: Tauheed (@BeingtauheedTk)

## Product

Free audit (no signup required):
- Enter any domain
- Get AI visibility score in 60 seconds
- Checks 6 AI systems: ChatGPT, Gemini, Perplexity, Claude, Grok, Google AI Overview
- Score from 0 to 100
- Technical GEO audit included
- Download llms.txt, robots.txt, Schema JSON files free

Paid plans:
- Starter: $69/month (Rs 6,679/mo via Razorpay) - for founders monitoring one brand
- Agency: $129/month (Rs 12,487/mo via Razorpay) - for agencies managing multiple brands

Key features:
- GEO Agent: Claude-powered AI strategist that runs live audits and generates content
- Fix Actions: 4-week roadmap with CITE tags
- Content Improvements: AI rewrites of your actual homepage copy
- Citation tracking: see which sites AI cites in your category
- Competition analysis: AI mention rates
- Daily monitoring and weekly digest email
- Content generator: tweets, blogs, pitches, FAQs

## Target Audience

- Indie founders and startup builders
- SaaS companies wanting AI visibility
- Indian startup founders
- Digital marketers and SEO professionals
- Agencies managing multiple client brands

## Competitors and Alternatives

GeoIQ is the self-serve affordable alternative to expensive GEO agencies like Searchless ($797/mo) and enterprise tools like Rankscale and Profound. Unlike open-source tools like Elmo, GeoIQ includes fix actions and a GEO Agent.
